title: calamagrostis hakonensis var. exaristata
intro: Calamagrostis hakonensis var. exaristata, also known as Hakone grass or Japanese feather reed grass, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis hakonensis var. exaristata include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
